summary: Admin Tenants page tested - Backend APIs mostly working (18/20 tests passed), fixed critical import bug in router.py. Frontend UI fully functional with all modals and views working correctly.

critical.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when creating with duplicate email - the code checks for `email` field but database stores as `contact_email`
critical.root_cause: Field name mismatch: Code line 195 checks `{"email": payload.email}` but Tenant model uses `contact_email`. Also when creating tenant, email is dropped due to `extra='ignore'`

critical.issue: Returns 200 without authentication - potential security issue. Should return 401/403
critical.note: May be intentional design but should be verified

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix create_tenant function - use `contact_email` instead of `email` for duplicate check (line 195) and when creating Tenant object (line 224)
CRITICAL: Update Tenant model to accept `email` field OR update code to use `contact_email`, `contact_phone` consistently
VERIFY: Check if GET /api/admin/tenants should require authentication or if public access is intentional
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Missing imports in /app/backend/domains/admin/router.py - added Tenant, get_plan_default_modules, PLAN_MODULE_DEFAULTS, get_all_module_keys, get_feature_comparison to imports
BUG: create_tenant uses `email`, `phone`, `description` fields but Tenant model has `contact_email`, `contact_phone` and no `description` - fields are dropped due to extra='ignore'
BUG: Duplicate email check on line 195 uses {"email": payload.email} but database stores as contact_email
CODE QUALITY: Tenant model in schemas.py has extra='ignore' which silently drops fields - consider extra='forbid' or add missing fields
seed_data_creation: Created test tenants and team members during API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Tenants feature working with one critical bug: create tenant duplicate email check fails with 500. Fixed import bug in router.py. Frontend all modals (Create, Edit, Team) and All Users view working correctly. Test IDs: admin-tenants-title, create-tenant-btn, view-all-users-btn, tenant-search, sort-btn, stat-basic/professional/enterprise, tenant-card-{id}, edit-btn-{id}, team-btn-{id}, create-tenant-* inputs, edit-tenant-* inputs, team-add-* inputs, users-back-btn, users-search

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/tenants: PASS - Returns tenant list with modules
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/tenants: PARTIAL - Works for new tenants, fails with 500 on duplicate email
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/tenants/{id}/stats: PASS - Returns rooms, users, guests, bookings stats
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/users: PASS - Returns all users with filters

frontend_pages.Admin Tenants List: PASS - Shows 27 tenants with stats cards, filters, sort
frontend_pages.Create Tenant Modal: PASS - All form fields present with correct data-testid
frontend_pages.Edit Tenant Modal: PASS - Pre-filled form with all fields
frontend_pages.Team Management Modal: PASS - Add member form with role dropdown
frontend_pages.All Users View: PASS - Table with role filters and search
frontend_pages.Tenant Stats Panel: PASS - Shows rooms, users, guests, bookings when expanded
frontend_pages.Module Toggles: PASS - Switch components for Core/Pro/Enterprise/AI modules

bug_fix_applied.change: Added missing imports: Tenant, get_plan_default_modules, PLAN_MODULE_DEFAULTS, get_all_module_keys, get_feature_comparison from subscription_models
bug_fix_applied.impact: Fixed create_tenant returning 500 due to NameError on undefined Tenant and get_plan_default_modules
